---
title: "Roadmap"
---

How every module depends on the others. Foundation modules (blue) are reusable building blocks
shared across courses; the green node is a whole prerequisite *course* you should have met first.
Every course also stands on [reading-math-notation](../../foundations/reading-math-notation/lesson.qmd),
the standing first prerequisite (not drawn below, to avoid clutter).

This course also **builds on** [Bayesian Colocalisation](../bayesian-colocalisation/syllabus.md)
(the `coloc_abf` machinery and the shared-vs-distinct PP4/PP3 question) and reuses its anchors
rather than re-teaching them; if rusty, skim its syllabus first. Note the framing **flips**: for
`coloc` a high PP4 supports colocalisation, but for the proportional test a *small p-value means
NOT colocalised*.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef foundation fill:#e8f0fe,stroke:#4285f4
    classDef priorcourse fill:#e6f4ea,stroke:#34a853

    F_mat["matrices-and-linear-transforms"]:::foundation
    F_dist["distributions-and-densities"]:::foundation
    F_var["variance-structure-and-standardization"]:::foundation
    F_hyp["hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals"]:::foundation
    F_lik["likelihood-and-log-likelihood"]:::foundation
    F_qf["quadratic-forms-and-the-chi-square-statistic"]:::foundation
    F_prof["profile-likelihood"]:::foundation
    F_fdr["false-discovery-rate"]:::foundation

    C_coloc["course: bayesian-colocalisation<br/>(coloc_abf, PP3 vs PP4)"]:::priorcourse

    M1["01 · when fine-mapping breaks"]
    M2["02 · how it corrupts coloc"]
    M3["03 · proportionality is colocalisation"]
    M4["04 · the proportional test statistic"]
    M5["05 · the pairwise correction"]
    M6["06 · capstone: reading colocPropTest"]

    %% foundation -> foundation edges (Builds on)
    F_mat --> F_qf
    F_var --> F_qf
    F_dist --> F_qf
    F_lik --> F_prof
    F_hyp --> F_fdr

    %% prior course -> modules
    C_coloc --> M1
    C_coloc --> M2

    %% foundations -> modules
    F_dist --> M1
    F_var --> M3
    F_qf --> M4
    F_prof --> M4
    F_hyp --> M3
    F_fdr --> M5

    %% module chain
    M1 --> M2
    M2 --> M3
    M3 --> M4
    M4 --> M5
    M5 --> M6
```

## Suggested order

1. Foundation: [reading-math-notation](../../foundations/reading-math-notation/lesson.qmd) — new / review
2. Prior course: [Bayesian Colocalisation](../bayesian-colocalisation/syllabus.md) (and its own prerequisites) — review
3. Foundation: [matrices-and-linear-transforms](../../foundations/matrices-and-linear-transforms/lesson.qmd) — new / review
4. Foundation: [distributions-and-densities](../../foundations/distributions-and-densities/lesson.qmd) — new / review
5. Foundation: [variance-structure-and-standardization](../../foundations/variance-structure-and-standardization/lesson.qmd) — new / review
6. Foundation: [hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals](../../foundations/hypothesis-tests-p-values-and-confidence-intervals/lesson.qmd) — new / review
7. Foundation: [likelihood-and-log-likelihood](../../foundations/likelihood-and-log-likelihood/lesson.qmd) — new / review
8. Foundation: [quadratic-forms-and-the-chi-square-statistic](../../foundations/quadratic-forms-and-the-chi-square-statistic/lesson.qmd) — new
9. Foundation: [profile-likelihood](../../foundations/profile-likelihood/lesson.qmd) — new
10. Foundation: [false-discovery-rate](../../foundations/false-discovery-rate/lesson.qmd) — new
11. [Module 1 · When fine-mapping breaks](modules/01-when-fine-mapping-breaks/lesson.qmd)
12. [Module 2 · How it corrupts coloc](modules/02-how-it-corrupts-coloc/lesson.qmd)
13. [Module 3 · Proportionality is colocalisation](modules/03-proportionality-is-colocalisation/lesson.qmd)
14. [Module 4 · The proportional test statistic](modules/04-the-proportional-test-statistic/lesson.qmd)
15. [Module 5 · The pairwise correction](modules/05-the-pairwise-fdr-adaptation/lesson.qmd)
16. [Module 6 · Capstone: reading colocPropTest](modules/06-capstone-reading-colocproptest/lesson.qmd)
